name: Orica Limited
analysis: ORI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$23.3000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$23.5300, stop A$22.0572, target A$25.9002 (1.61:1) — then trail it.
